top_signals.title: Canada, Philippines Agree to Sign Trade Deal This Year, Grow Defense Ties
top_signals.summary: Canada and the Philippines plan to finalize a free trade agreement this year, and signed agreements to deepen cooperation on energy, defense, labor and migration, Prime Minister Mark Carney said Thursday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: How to Save the U.S.-Israeli Alliance
top_signals.summary: If Iran gets a new deal with America, so must Israel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Commission partially greenlights Spain's sixth payment request for €5.7 billion under NextGenerationEU*
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 03 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission partially greenlighted Spain's sixth payment request worth €5.7 billion under the Recovery and Resilience Facility, the centrepiece of NextGenerationEU. At the same time, it has greenlighted a payment for two milestones suspended earlier under the fifth payment request.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Canada commits $352M to Red Chris mine expansion in British Columbia
top_signals.summary: Last month, the project received crucial regulatory approvals.
